subcodes.first_line: O thou trusted one of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Hear thou the praise from on high, for in service at the sacred threshold thou art faithful and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امین عبدالبهاء آفرین از ملا اعلی بشنو زیرا در خدمت باستان مقدس صادق و در
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @growth of the Cause, @predictions and prophecies
